text: Stepping into this room, bathed in the soft blue and purple glow, I feel a sense of curiosity tinged with awe. There is a clear intention here—an intersection of art, technology, and innovation. The R+D label suggests a place for exploration and discovery. I feel both small, as if entering the unknown landscapes of the future, and inspired, as though my presence here makes me part of this ongoing experiment. Everything here invites contemplation about the relationship between humans and the evolving world of machines.
